tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayCreateBudget.createBudget
tools.description:
Creates a budget and, if included, notifications and subscribers.

Only one of BudgetLimit or PlannedBudgetLimits can be present in the syntax at one time. Use the syntax that matches your case. The Request Syntax section shows the BudgetLimit syntax. For PlannedBudgetLimits, see the Examples section.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayCreateBudgetAction.createBudgetAction
tools.description: Creates a budget action.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayCreateNotification.createNotification
tools.description: Creates a notification. You must create the budget before you create the associated notification.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayCreateSubscriber.createSubscriber
tools.description: Creates a subscriber. You must create the associated budget and notification before you create the subscriber.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDeleteBudget.deleteBudget
tools.description:
Deletes a budget. You can delete your budget at any time.

Deleting a budget also deletes the notifications and subscribers that are associated with that budget.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDeleteBudgetAction.deleteBudgetAction
tools.description: Deletes a budget action.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDeleteNotification.deleteNotification
tools.description:
Deletes a notification.

Deleting a notification also deletes the subscribers that are associated with the notification.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDeleteSubscriber.deleteSubscriber
tools.description:
Deletes a subscriber.

Deleting the last subscriber to a notification also deletes the notification.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudget.describeBudget
tools.description:
Describes a budget.

The Request Syntax section shows the BudgetLimit syntax. For PlannedBudgetLimits, see the Examples section.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgetAction.describeBudgetAction
tools.description: Describes a budget action detail.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgetActionHistories.describeBudgetActionHistories
tools.description: Describes a budget action history detail.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgetActionsForAccount.describeBudgetActionsForAccount
tools.description: Describes all of the budget actions for an account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgetActionsForBudget.describeBudgetActionsForBudget
tools.description: Describes all of the budget actions for a budget.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgetNotificationsForAccount.describeBudgetNotificationsForAccount
tools.description: Lists the budget names and notifications that are associated with an account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgetPerformanceHistory.describeBudgetPerformanceHistory
tools.description: Describes the history for DAILY, MONTHLY, and QUARTERLY budgets. Budget history isn't available for ANNUAL budgets.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeBudgets.describeBudgets
tools.description:
Lists the budgets that are associated with an account.

The Request Syntax section shows the BudgetLimit syntax. For PlannedBudgetLimits, see the Examples section.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeNotificationsForBudget.describeNotificationsForBudget
tools.description: Lists the notifications that are associated with a budget.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayDescribeSubscribersForNotification.describeSubscribersForNotification
tools.description: Lists the subscribers that are associated with a notification.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayExecuteBudgetAction.executeBudgetAction
tools.description: Executes a budget action.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayUpdateBudget.updateBudget
tools.description:
Updates a budget. You can change every part of a budget except for the budgetName and the calculatedSpend. When you modify a budget, the calculatedSpend drops to zero until Amazon Web Services has new usage data to use for forecasting.

Only one of BudgetLimit or PlannedBudgetLimits can be present in the syntax at one time. Use the syntax that matches your case. The Request Syntax section shows the BudgetLimit syntax. For PlannedBudgetLimits, see the Examples section.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayUpdateBudgetAction.updateBudgetAction
tools.description: Updates a budget action.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayUpdateNotification.updateNotification
tools.description: Updates a notification.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsBudgetServiceGatewayUpdateSubscriber.updateSubscriber
tools.description: Updates a subscriber.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
